text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Race Fan A
text_block_list.text:
It's time, it's time! We finally get to see Admire
Vega, T.M. Opera O, Narita Top Road, and
Meisho Doto go head to head!

text_block_list.name: Race Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Doto really stepped up to be taking on the big
three from last year's Classics. I'm so glad I'm here
to see this all go down!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe Fan A
text_block_list.text:
But Admire Vega will definitely win the autumn
shield. She's been blasting through the
competition! She's flawless!

text_block_list.name: Opera O Fan A
text_block_list.text:
No way, it'll be Opera O for sure! She's got that
inexplicable strength that'll definitely make her
the top of her generation!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan A
text_block_list.text: ...N-no way! Not a chance!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Top Road is gonna win today for sure! Without a
doubt!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the race beginning soon, Admire Vega's
ready to go. I watch her take in a deep breath,
and I suddenly have the urge to ask her
something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, I've never really asked
her this before.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. A little.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I think... I've got a lot on my mind right now.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, all I could think about was winning
to fulfill my duty. It was simple.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But now...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I think about Opera O's endless vigor... and
Doto's tenacity...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: And Top Road's resolve.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I think of everyone's desire to win... including my
own.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I think about the excitement of heading into a
race. And the fear just before it starts.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's all... bouncing around in my head.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So, yeah... I'm feeling nervous.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to tell her it's a good kind of tension, but I
stop myself...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She should hold onto this feeling just a little
longer.

text_block_list.name: Official
text_block_list.text: Admire Vega! Please head to the paddock!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...It's time.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll be back after I win.
